caribbean.headline: Bimini Faces Gale Conditions
caribbean.paragraph: Bimini is experiencing sustained winds of 34 kt with wave heights reaching 5.7 ft, as a tropical disturbance brings a 77% chance of rain to the area. I expect these conditions to impact port operations, with the strong winds and moderate waves requiring caution for ships navigating the region, particularly in the northern waters where the dominant swell direction is from the north.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing strong winds of up to 21 kt and wave heights of 5.2 ft, with a dominant swell direction from the southwest, while Mykonos is seeing winds of 17 kt. I expect these conditions to be accompanied by heavy rain, with a 100% probability of precipitation in Marseille, making for challenging navigation in the Central Mediterranean today.
